title: DatasetQuality
description: Dataset-level quality metrics aggregated from example scores. Provides overall assessment and recommendations for dataset improvement.

id.description: Unique identifier for this quality record

experiment_run_id.description: ID of the experiment run this quality assessment belongs to

dataset_quality.description: Overall dataset quality score (weighted composite of component scores)

coverage_score.description: How well the dataset covers the problem space (based on diversity and spread)

diversity_score.description: Diversity of examples in the dataset (low redundancy, high uniqueness)

efficiency_score.description: Cost efficiency of the dataset (information per resource spent)

top_informative_ids.description: IDs of the top 20 most informative examples (highest informativeness scores)

top_difficult_ids.description: IDs of the top 20 most difficult examples (highest difficulty scores)

low_value_ids.description: IDs of up to 20 low-value examples (candidates for removal)

redundant_pairs.description: Pairs of example IDs that are highly similar/redundant (max 50 pairs)

score_distributions.description: Distribution statistics for each score type

example_ids.description: Example IDs related to this recommendation

recommendations.description: Actionable recommendations for improving dataset quality

algorithm_version.description: Version of the quality assessment algorithm

created_at.description: Timestamp when this quality assessment was computed

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this quality assessment was last updated
